rulings.Case Title: MISSION APARTMENTS-8909-8936 S. NOGALES HIGHWAY VS. SAN FRANCISCO RESIDENTIAL RENT STABILIZATION AND ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 26, 2022 line 1. NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR HEARING ON PETITION FOR WRIT OF ADMINISTRATIVE MADAMUS Hearing Required. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: LIANA TAHIR VS. KENDRICK LEWALLEN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Quash Service Of Summons
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 26, 2022 line 12. DEFENDANT KENDRICK LEWALLEN'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS is DENIED. Order authorizing service per CCP 415.45 on file as of September 26, 2022. Defendant fails to cite any authority for the proposition that service of the summons and complaint is improper in the absence of service of the Order. Defendant shall file a response no later than November 2, 2022. Plaintiff to prepare order (tracking the tentative ruling verbatim in the substantive part) and present for execution at the hearing. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849).
